Native name.text: ヤマハ発動機株式会社

Key people.text: Katsuaki Watanabe ( chairman & Director ) Motofumi Shitara ( president & Representative Director )

Products.text: Motorcycles , commuter vehicles & scooters , recreational vehicles, boats, marine engines, small tractors, personal watercraft , electrically power assisted bicycles, automobile engines, golf carts , cycling components

Owners.text: The Master Trust Bank of Japan (18.03%) Custody Bank of Japan (5.84%) Yamaha Corporation (4.73%) Toyota Motor Corporation (3.78%) SMBC Nikko Securities (3.37%) (as of December 31, 2023) [ 1 ]

Team principal/s.text: Paul Denning, Project Director Team Manager
